response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:55: Identified 'Night of Fire' by Niko via on-screen text. Lyrics found on Genius. 2. 00:55-03:02: Monologue by Tsunomaki Watame. 3. 03:02-03:42: Transition. 4. 03:42-04:55: Identified '灰色の証明' by Kishida (Kishida Kyoudan & The Akeboshi Rockets) via on-screen text. Lyrics could not be found via multiple search attempts (Google/Bing). 5. 04:55-05:01: Video end.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a dance performance to 'Night of Fire', followed by a monologue by the VTuber Tsunomaki Watame, and then a vocal performance of her song '灰色の証明'.

scenes.description: A group of VTubers perform a dance routine to the song 'Night of Fire'. Text 'Night of Fire' is visible.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Welcome to the broken low
Welcome to the famous disco live
Come on lady, come and go
Come on lady, get me once and right

Not a danger, not a blacky stranger
Rock it, rock it, knock to my door I'll open
Speak my name now, speak it if you know how
Fly to me, get ready for the...

Night of fire, you better, better stay
You better, better begin the prayer to play
Night of fire, come on, come over me
Come on over the top, you've never been here
Night of fire, you better, better stay
You better begin the prayer to play
Night of fire, come on, come over me
Come over the top, you'll have a night of fire
You'll have a night of fire

Welcome to my rocky show
Welcome to the fire of the night
Come on babe, let it go
Come on babe, let me stick you tight

Not a danger, not a blacky stranger
Rock it, rock it, knock to my door I'll open
Speak my name now, speak it if you know how
Fly to me, get ready for the...

You better, better begin the prayer to play

Come on over the top, you've never been here
Night of fire, you better, better stay
You better begin the prayer to play
Night of fire, come on, come over me
Come over the top, you'll have a night of fire
You'll have a night of fire

scenes.description: Tsunomaki Watame gives a monologue/talk to the audience.
Tsunomaki Watame performs the song '灰色の証明'. Text '灰色の証明' and composer credits are visible.
